seo.title: 3-Day Fes to Marrakech Desert Tour
seo.metaDescription: Take a 3-day Fes to Marrakech desert tour via Ifrane, Ziz Valley, Merzouga camel trek, Todra Gorge, Dades Valley, and Ait Ben Haddou.
seo.lead: A practical 3-day Fes to Marrakech desert tour that crosses the Middle Atlas, reaches the Erg Chebbi dunes, and continues through southern Morocco's kasbah valleys.
seo.primaryKeyword: Fes to Marrakech desert tour 3 days

price.label: Custom quote
price.note: Final pricing depends on travel dates, group size, accommodation level, and private or shared transport. Send your dates for an exact quote.

seo.imageAlt: Camel caravan in Erg Chebbi on a 3-day Fes to Marrakech desert tour
highlights: Travel from Fes through Ifrane, Azrou, Midelt, and Ziz Valley
Ride camels into Erg Chebbi for sunset and desert camping
Visit Todra Gorge, Dades Valley, Ouarzazate, and Ait Ben Haddou
End in Marrakech after crossing the High Atlas Mountains

faqs.question: Can this desert tour start in Fes and end in Marrakech?
faqs.answer: Yes. This itinerary is designed as a point-to-point route from Fes to Marrakech with a Sahara desert night in Merzouga.

faqs.question: How long are the driving days?
faqs.answer: Driving times vary by day, with the longest stretches on the Fes to Merzouga and Dades to Marrakech routes. The itinerary includes scenic breaks and visits along the way.

faqs.question: Is luggage safe during the camel trek?
faqs.answer: Your main luggage stays secure with the vehicle or camp team. Bring a small overnight bag for the desert camp.

faqs.question: What desert dunes does this tour visit?
faqs.answer: The tour visits the Erg Chebbi dunes near Merzouga, one of Morocco's most popular Sahara camel trekking areas.

faqs.question: Can I choose a luxury camp for the Merzouga night?
faqs.answer: Yes. Standard and luxury camp upgrades can be arranged depending on availability and your budget.

jsonLd.name: Caravan and Kasbah Experience - 3 Days
jsonLd.description: Journey from Fes to Marrakech through ancient kasbahs and golden dunes on this unforgettable 3-day caravan experience.
